name: deng-xiaoping-and-the-transformation-of-china
description: Ezra F. Vogel's Deng Xiaoping and the Transformation of China — a leadership biography chronicling Deng's role in transforming China from a poor, isolated country after Mao into a global economic superpower through market reforms, the Four Modernizations, and his pragmatic approach.
useCase: Understand Deng Xiaoping's life and leadership — how his pragmatic reforms transformed China's economy and society.
knownRisks: The book covers Tiananmen up to 1989 — the account is criticized by human rights advocates for not being more condemnatory
Vogel was criticized by some for being too sympathetic to Deng
The 1992 Southern Tour and post-1989 reform acceleration is compressed
